summary.en: Payments and economic infrastructure that lets businesses accept money and run financial operations online.
summary.zh: 為企業提供線上收款與金融營運的支付與經濟基礎設施。

highlight.en: Stripe is YC's most valuable company ever and the poster child of the accelerator's fintech success. A February 2026 tender offer valued it at $159 billion, up from $91.5 billion a year earlier.
highlight.zh: Stripe 是 YC 史上最有價值的公司,也是該加速器金融科技成功的代表作。2026 年 2 月的股權收購交易將其估值定在 1,590 億美元,較一年前的 915 億美元大幅成長。

funding.en: Last valued ~$159B (Feb 2026 tender offer); raised >$9B total
funding.zh: 最新估值約 1,590 億美元(2026 年 2 月股權收購);累計募資超過 90 億美元

sources.title: Stripe's valuation soars 74% to $159 billion | TechCrunch
Stripe valued at $159 billion after tender offer | CNBC

summary.en: Product and event analytics that lets teams measure user behavior and make data-driven decisions.
summary.zh: 提供產品與事件分析,讓團隊衡量使用者行為並做出數據驅動的決策。

highlight.en: An early YC analytics player whose customers include OpenAI, Netflix and Uber. It hit unicorn status in 2021 with a $200M Series C from Bain Capital at a ~$1.05B valuation.
highlight.zh: Mixpanel 是 YC 早期的分析類公司,客戶包括 OpenAI、Netflix 與 Uber。2021 年憑藉 Bain Capital 領投的 2 億美元 C 輪、約 10.5 億美元估值躋身獨角獸。

funding.zh: 估值約 10.5 億美元(2021 年 C 輪);累計募資約 2.77 億美元

summary.en: Multi-party payments API for SaaS, point-of-sale platforms and online marketplaces.
summary.zh: 為 SaaS、POS 平台與線上市集提供多方支付 API。

highlight.en: WePay pioneered embedded payments for platforms before exiting to a banking giant. JPMorgan Chase acquired it in 2017 in a deal reported at up to $400 million.
highlight.zh: WePay 在嵌入式平台支付領域開先河,最終被銀行巨頭收購。摩根大通於 2017 年收購,交易金額據報導最高達 4 億美元。

funding.zh: 2017 年由摩根大通收購(約 3 至 4 億美元)

sources.title: JPMorgan buys fintech start-up WePay | CNBC
J.P. Morgan Chase Acquires WePay In $400M Deal | Retail TouchPoints

summary.en: Digital experience platform for A/B testing, experimentation and marketing content optimization.
summary.zh: 提供 A/B 測試、實驗與行銷內容優化的數位體驗平台。

highlight.en: Optimizely turned web experimentation into a mainstream marketing discipline after raising over $200M. It was acquired by Episerver (an Insight Partners company) in 2020, which then rebranded under the Optimizely name.
highlight.zh: Optimizely 在募資逾 2 億美元後,將網站實驗推廣為主流行銷方法。2020 年被 Episerver(Insight Partners 旗下公司)收購,後者並更名為 Optimizely。

funding.en: Acquired by Episerver in 2020; had raised >$200M
funding.zh: 2020 年被 Episerver 收購;此前募資超過 2 億美元

summary.en: Gift card exchange marketplace to buy, sell or trade new and pre-owned gift cards.
summary.zh: 禮品卡交易市集,可買賣或交換全新及二手禮品卡。

highlight.en: Cardpool built one of the earliest consumer marketplaces for discounted gift cards out of YC. It was later acquired by Blackhawk Network, the prepaid and gift card giant.
highlight.zh: Cardpool 是 YC 中最早期的折扣禮品卡消費者市集之一,後來被預付卡與禮品卡巨頭 Blackhawk Network 收購。

summary.en: Customer loyalty and retention marketing platform serving CMOs and retail brands.
summary.zh: 為行銷長與零售品牌提供顧客忠誠度與留存行銷平台。

highlight.en: 500Friends built a SaaS loyalty platform that became an enterprise marketing offering. It was acquired by Merkle, where it became Merkle Loyalty Solutions.
highlight.zh: 500Friends 打造的 SaaS 忠誠度平台後來成為企業行銷產品,被 Merkle 收購並改名為 Merkle Loyalty Solutions。

summary.en: Incident response and operations platform giving teams real-time visibility into critical apps and services.
summary.zh: 事件回應與營運平台,讓團隊即時掌握關鍵應用與服務狀態。

highlight.en: PagerDuty became a defining YC enterprise SaaS success, serving over 10,000 customers like Slack and Lululemon. It went public on the NYSE in April 2019 at roughly a $1.3 billion valuation.
highlight.zh: PagerDuty 成為 YC 企業級 SaaS 的代表性成功案例,服務 Slack、Lululemon 等逾 1 萬家客戶。2019 年 4 月在紐約證交所上市,估值約 13 億美元。

funding.en: IPO'd on NYSE in 2019 at ~$1.3B valuation
funding.zh: 2019 年在紐約證交所上市,估值約 13 億美元

founders: Alex Solomon, Andrew Miklas, Baskar Puvanathasan

sources.title: How PagerDuty Became a $1.9B Public Co.

summary.en: On-demand marketplace matching customers with vetted, background-checked home cleaning professionals.
summary.zh: 隨選媒合平台,為顧客配對經審核與背景查核的居家清潔專業人員。

highlight.en: Homejoy was an early on-demand home services darling founded by sibling duo Aaron and Adora Cheung. It became a cautionary tale of the gig economy, shutting down in 2015 amid worker-classification lawsuits.
highlight.zh: Homejoy 由 Aaron 與 Adora Cheung 兄妹創立,是早期隨選居家服務的明星公司。後來在勞工身分歸類訴訟中於 2015 年關閉,成為零工經濟的警世案例。

funding.zh: 2015 年關閉;累計募資約 4,000 萬美元

summary.en: Restaurant automation using computer vision, voice AI and payments for big chains like McDonald's and Chili's.
summary.zh: 餐廳自動化方案,以電腦視覺、語音 AI 與支付服務麥當勞、Chili's 等大型連鎖。

highlight.en: Presto (formerly E la Carte) brought tabletop tech and drive-thru voice AI to major restaurant chains. It went public via SPAC in 2022 at a ~$1B implied valuation but was delisted from Nasdaq in 2024 amid liquidity troubles.
highlight.zh: Presto(前身為 E la Carte)為大型餐廳連鎖帶來桌邊科技與得來速語音 AI。2022 年透過 SPAC 上市,隱含估值約 10 億美元,但因流動性問題於 2024 年自 Nasdaq 下市。

funding.en: SPAC IPO in 2022 (~$1B implied); delisted from Nasdaq in 2024
funding.zh: 2022 年 SPAC 上市(隱含估值約 10 億美元);2024 年自 Nasdaq 下市

sources.title: Presto Automation delisted from Nasdaq | Restaurant Dive

summary.en: Travel search engine that visually compared flights and hotels to take the agony out of booking.
summary.zh: 旅遊搜尋引擎,以視覺化方式比較機票與飯店,讓訂位不再痛苦。

highlight.en: Co-founded by Reddit's Steve Huffman, Hipmunk reimagined flight search with its signature 'Agony' sort. It was acquired by SAP Concur in 2016 and shut down in 2020.
highlight.zh: Hipmunk 由 Reddit 共同創辦人 Steve Huffman 共同創立,以招牌的「Agony」排序重新想像機票搜尋。2016 年被 SAP Concur 收購,並於 2020 年關閉。

funding.en: Acquired by SAP Concur in 2016; shut down in 2020
funding.zh: 2016 年被 SAP Concur 收購;2020 年關閉

sources.title: Four years after being acquired, Hipmunk is shutting down | TechCrunch

summary.en: Digital wealth management and robo-advisory service offering low-cost portfolio management for everyday investors.
summary.zh: 數位財富管理與機器人理財服務,為一般投資人提供低成本的投資組合管理。

highlight.en: FutureAdvisor was an early robo-advisor democratizing wealth management for mass-affluent households. It was acquired by asset-management giant BlackRock in 2015.
highlight.zh: FutureAdvisor 是早期的機器人理財顧問,讓中產家庭也能享有財富管理服務。2015 年被資產管理巨頭 BlackRock 收購。

funding.zh: 2015 年被 BlackRock 收購(據報導約 1.5 億美元)

summary.en: Global marketplace for authentic sneakers, apparel and accessories, including Flight Club and Grailed.
summary.zh: 全球正品球鞋、服飾與配件市集,旗下包含 Flight Club 與 Grailed。

highlight.en: GOAT Group pioneered ship-to-verify authentication and built a 50M-member community across four brands. A June 2021 Series F valued it at $3.7 billion, making it a clear unicorn (and approaching decacorn talk).
highlight.zh: GOAT Group 開創「先送驗、後出貨」的驗證模式,以四個品牌打造逾 5,000 萬會員的社群。2021 年 6 月的 F 輪將其估值定在 37 億美元,穩居獨角獸之列。

funding.en: Last valued ~$3.7B (2021 Series F); raised $195M in that round
funding.zh: 最新估值約 37 億美元(2021 年 F 輪);該輪募資 1.95 億美元

sources.title: Sneaker marketplace GOAT hits $3.7B valuation in Series F raise | TechCrunch
